## Description
Allow families or groups to share saving goals and track collective progress.

## Benefits
- Shared financial goals
- Family accountability
- Combined statistics

## Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Group/family table
- [ ] Permission system
- [ ] Shared purchases
- [ ] Combined statistics view
